title: pluchea carolinensis
intro: Pluchea carolinensis, also known as Wild Ergot or Carolina Pluchea, is a perennial plant belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pluchea carolinensis include its ability to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antiseptic to aid in wound healing. Herbal preparations of Pluchea carolinensis are often made from its roots and leaves, which can be used to create teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal purposes.
